title: Black Nine
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Black}}
'''Black Nine''' was a [[Type II Orbital Repair Yard]] in the service of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]], assigned to [[Sixth Negative Regions|Black Sword Command]] and sited in the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]].

==History==
The shipyard was overrun by the [[Yevetha]] when they rebelled against Imperial control in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] and relocated to the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] world of [[Prildaz]], in the [[ILC-905 system]]. In [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]], as the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] moved forces into Koornacht in response to the genocidal [[Yevethan Purge]], a squadron led by [[Commodore/Legends|Commodore]] [[Turk Brand|Brand]] aboard the cruiser [[Indomitable (Majestic-class)|''Indomitable'']] discovered Black Nine and destroyed the yard and its defending [[Aramadia-class thrustship|thrustships]] in the [[Battle of ILC-905]].

{{Station-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
